---
title: "Hello there!"
---

By day, I'm a regional economist at **Banque de France** — decoding inflation trends,
assessing corporate solvency, and turning macroeconomic noise into strategic signal for
decision-makers. Over a decade of financial analysis, and I still find the numbers
interesting.

By evening, I'm on **HackTheBox**, breaking things intentionally. I'm pivoting into
cybersecurity — penetration testing, digital forensics, incident investigation — drawn
to the place where data, security, and human error intersect.

In between, I teach. **Statistics and information systems** at ESSCA, **financial
analysis** at INSEEC. I run my courses like RPGs: students earn XP, level up, and
hopefully leave knowing why the Central Limit Theorem actually matters.

This site is my lab notebook — [writeups](/posts/) from CTF challenges, tutorials on
[AI-powered static sites](/posts/) and cloud dev environments, and course materials
for my [students](/teaching/). Everything here is built with Quarto, Python, and R,
with occasional detours into Cloudflare Workers and Kali Linux.

[About me →](about/README.qmd)

```{=html}
<!-- AI Resume Chat Box -->
<!-- Replace WORKER_URL with your Cloudflare Worker URL after    -->
<!-- running: wrangler deploy (inside the worker/ directory)     -->

<div id="chat-box">
  <div id="chat-messages">
    <div class="chat-msg bot">
      Hi! I'm an AI assistant. Ask me anything about Guillaume's background,
      skills, or experience. 👋
    </div>
  </div>
  <div id="chat-input-row">
    <input id="chat-input" type="text" placeholder="e.g. What's his cybersecurity experience?" autocomplete="off" />
    <button id="chat-send">Send</button>
  </div>
</div>

<script>
(function () {
  // ← Replace with your deployed Cloudflare Worker URL after running: wrangler deploy
  const WORKER_URL = "https://resume-chat.YOUR-SUBDOMAIN.workers.dev";

  const msgs  = document.getElementById("chat-messages");
  const input = document.getElementById("chat-input");
  const send  = document.getElementById("chat-send");

  let history = [];
  let busy = false;

  send.addEventListener("click", sendMessage);
  input.addEventListener("keydown", (e) => {
    if (e.key === "Enter" && !e.shiftKey) { e.preventDefault(); sendMessage(); }
  });

  function appendMsg(text, role) {
    const div = document.createElement("div");
    div.className = `chat-msg ${role}`;
    div.textContent = text;
    msgs.appendChild(div);
    msgs.scrollTop = msgs.scrollHeight;
    return div;
  }

  async function sendMessage() {
    const text = input.value.trim();
    if (!text || busy) return;

    busy = true;
    send.disabled = true;
    input.value = "";

    appendMsg(text, "user");
    const thinking = appendMsg("Thinking…", "bot typing");

    try {
      const res = await fetch(WORKER_URL, {
        method: "POST",
        headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
        body: JSON.stringify({ message: text, history }),
      });

      const data = await res.json();
      const reply = data.reply || data.error || "Something went wrong.";

      thinking.className = "chat-msg bot";
      thinking.textContent = reply;

      history.push({ role: "user", content: text });
      history.push({ role: "assistant", content: reply });
    } catch {
      thinking.className = "chat-msg bot";
      thinking.textContent = "⚠️ Could not reach the assistant. Please try again.";
    }

    busy = false;
    send.disabled = false;
    input.focus();
    msgs.scrollTop = msgs.scrollHeight;
  }
})();
</script>
```
